privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a synthetic Maven local repository named 'project-alpha-snapshots'. The repository must have snapshot handling enabled and a snapshot retention policy limiting the maximum unique snapshots to 5. Artifactory is accessed locally using the default credentials (admin / password).
